general.title: General
general.description: After changes, use "Save" at the bottom to write to local config.
general.openLastProjectDesc: Automatically restore the last opened project directory
general.autoCheckUpdateDesc: Query GitHub Releases on launch for new versions
general.appVersionDesc: Manually check the GitHub releases page
general.alertSoundDesc: Play a short beep on user alerts (combined with options below)
general.alertNotificationDesc: Use the OS notification center (silent by itself, can stack with sound)
general.alertOnExtensionUiDesc: Alert when a compatibility-layer dialog needs your answer (Agent will pause and wait)
general.alertOnRunIdleDesc: Alert when the focused session Agent goes idle
general.alertOnBackgroundRunIdleDesc: Notify when a background session finishes (off by default)
general.maxSessionWorkersDesc: Parallel worker cap; running sessions are never reclaimed (≥1)
general.sessionWorkerIdleTimeoutDesc: Reclaim idle workers after N minutes; 0 = never by timeout
general.timelineToolAutoExpandMaxDesc: During an active run, how many recent tool rows stay expanded; older ones collapse to reduce lag (1–50, default 15)
general.noRecentProjectsHint: Open a workspace to see it here

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme preview updates instantly; persist with "Save" at the bottom.
appearance.themeDesc: Choose light, dark, or follow system

pi.title: Pi Configuration
pi.description: Writes to ~/.pi/agent/settings.json and project .pi/settings.json (via Worker SettingsManager, same as terminal pi). Use "Save" at the bottom after changes.
pi.loadErrorHint: (Open a workspace first to start the Worker)
pi.fallbackUser: Standalone env unavailable, fell back to built-in
pi.fallbackGlobal: Global version unavailable, fell back to built-in
pi.fallbackWorker: Target SDK failed to load, fell back to built-in
pi.upgradeSuccess: SDK upgrade complete, switched to standalone env
pi.defaultModelDesc: Default provider / model for new sessions (from ~/.pi/agent/models.json, independent of current project)
pi.compactionKeepDesc: compaction.keepRecentTokens, recent tokens kept without summarizing (default 20000)
pi.treeHint: Session tree: when the main input is empty, double-tap Esc to open the full view (same as TUI /tree). Use /trust after opening a project to set trust.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Enable/disable stays in sync with terminal pi: writes to ~/.pi/agent/settings.json packages[].extensions or extensions path (± mode). Worker reloads immediately on toggle.
extensions.missingRuntimeDesc: Cloned locally via git but not listed in settings.packages (terminal may load them another way; desktop will not).
extensions.writePackages: Write to settings.packages and restart Worker
extensions.noAdapter: No desktop adapter registered (no dedicated desktop UI; tools/commands still load in sessions)
extensions.tuiOnly: Terminal only (TUI decoration, not replicated on desktop)
extensions.workerLoadHint: Cloned locally via git but not listed in settings.packages (terminal may load them another way; desktop will not).
extensions.empty: No extensions detected. Place .ts extension files or directories under .pi/extensions/ to be detected.

adapters.title: Desktop Adapters
adapters.description: Registered adapter.json compatibility layer; one adapter per plugin, integrating plugins into desktop UI and config via the compat layer.
adapters.empty: No desktop adapters registered. Plugins still appear on the Extensions page; to integrate a new plugin, declare an adapter.json in the compat layer.

models.title: Model Providers
models.description: Edit {{path}}, consistent with terminal pi. Model list reloads after save.
models.noProvidersHint: Click "Add provider" to pick a template or set up a custom relay.
models.name: Name
models.applyTemplateConfirm:
Overwrite connection config with the {{label}} template?
Keeps current Key and added models.
models.localEmptyHint: Click + in the remote list to add, or add manually
models.enterAtLeastOne: Enter at least one model id
models.manualAddHint: The id must match the API request. Add multiple via line breaks or commas.
models.manualAddPlaceholder: e.g. gpt-4.1-mini or one id per line
models.errInvalidFormat: Only letters, digits, and . - _ : + / % @ (must start with alphanumeric or _)

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.description: Configure a transcription provider for Composer voice-to-text. When not configured, text input is unaffected.
voice.apiKeyDesc: Required when serve is started with --api-key
voice.descriptionBuiltin: In-app transcription via your ChatGPT / Codex session (no OpenAI API key, no local codex-asr process).
voice.builtinDesc: Paste an access_token or use ~/.codex/auth.json; requests go to the ChatGPT transcribe API.
voice.codexLoginDesc: Paste a JWT (eyJ…) or import from auth.json. Checks stay on-device. Until you Save at the bottom, Composer may still use the last saved config.
voice.bundledBinaryFallback: Without a bundled binary, PATH codex-asr is used (install separately).
voice.advancedHint: Optional: local codex-asr CLI or your own HTTP serve. Built-in direct API is the default.
voice.unsavedVoiceHint: Voice settings changed but not saved. Composer previews this draft; use Save at the bottom to persist.
voice.cliInstallHint: Only needed when using advanced CLI mode
voice.localApiKeyPlaceholder: Local serve API key (not ChatGPT token)
voice.accessTokenPlaceholder: Paste ChatGPT JWT (eyJ…); saved value overrides auth.json
voice.builtinRuntimeHint: Built-in uses in-app direct calls to ChatGPT transcribe (https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/transcribe). No codex-asr binary or local serve required.

prompts.title: Prompts & Context
prompts.description: Grouped by how they enter the conversation context: project context (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md), global, and per-turn system. When no global SYSTEM.md exists, opening the "Global" item prefills the built-in text; saving makes it effective. Items marked "per-turn system" are injected into each session.
prompts.empty: No entries found (open a workspace and refresh)
prompts.selectLeftToEdit: Select an item on the left to edit

agentsGlobal.description: Project context from the global agent directory (injected into <project_context>)

systemProject.name: SYSTEM.md (project)
systemProject.description: Replaces the default harness system prompt (overrides global SYSTEM.md)

systemGlobal.descriptionExists: Replaces the default harness system prompt
systemGlobal.descriptionCreate: Not created yet; saving writes ~/.pi/agent/SYSTEM.md and replaces the built-in default

systemDefaultPreview.name: Built-in system (read-only preview)
systemDefaultPreview.description: System prompt assembled for the current session (read-only preview)

appendProject.name: APPEND_SYSTEM.md (project)
appendProject.description: Appended to the end of the system prompt

appendGlobal.name: APPEND_SYSTEM.md (global)
appendGlobal.description: Appended to the end of the system prompt

skills.description: Writes to desktopSkillOverrides. Use "Save" at the bottom (writes to disk immediately, no Worker reload).
skills.hint: All enabled by default. Toggles are written to ~/.pi/agent/settings.json
skills.empty: No skills found (open a workspace first)

rightPanels.description: Drag-sort and toggles only modify the draft. Use "Save" at the bottom to persist and update the main UI tabs.
